title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
